contract.description: Contract sync definition bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.

scope.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT datasetId AS [datasetId] FROM core.Dataset WHERE contractId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[datasetId] = [core].[DatasetMapping].[datasetId_Left])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT datasetId AS [datasetId] FROM core.Dataset WHERE contractId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[datasetId] = [core].[DatasetColumn].[datasetId])

EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM core.DatasetMapping WHERE datasetId_Left IN (SELECT datasetId FROM core.Dataset WHERE contractId = {id})) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[datasetMappingId] = [core].[DatasetMappingColumn].[datasetMappingId])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT pipelineId AS [pipelineId] FROM core.Pipeline WHERE contractId = {id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[pipelineId] = [core].[Activity].[pipelineId])

scope.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = [core].[Dataset].[datasetId] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = [core].[Dataset].[datasetId])

EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] dm INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] WHERE dm.[datasetMappingId] = [core].[DatasetMapping].[datasetMappingId])

EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = [core].[DatasetColumn].[datasetId] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = [core].[DatasetColumn].[datasetId])

EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] dm INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[inputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] OR __mia_scope.[outputDatasetId] = dm.[datasetId_Left] WHERE dm.[datasetMappingId] = [core].[DatasetMappingColumn].[datasetMappingId])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleLink] rl INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[ruleId] = rl.[ruleId] WHERE rl.[ruleLinkTypeId] = [core].[RuleLinkType].[ruleLinkTypeId])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleTypeId] = [core].[RuleType].[ruleTypeId])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[Rule].[ruleId])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[RuleLink].[ruleId])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[RuleCondition].[ruleId])

EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleCondition] rc INNER JOIN [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope ON __mia_scope.[ruleId] = rc.[ruleId] WHERE rc.[ruleConditionId] = [core].[RuleConditionValue].[ruleConditionId])
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[fRule]({id}) AS __mia_scope WHERE __mia_scope.[ruleId] = [core].[RuleColumn].[ruleId])

syncMetadata._comment: MyMI-derived sync vocabulary: actions (reusable handlers), value sources (wiring), and flows (ordered step instances). Seeds DB-backed config; operators may edit after bootstrap.

definition.description: Steps run on the source database before the metadata sync transaction opens on the target. Typical uses: audit gates (syncOrNot), contract locks. Failures here stop the entire run.
definition.orderingHint: Must appear before the first metadataSync step in the flow array.

definition.description: The metadataSync step runs in a single SQL transaction on the target: applies the change set (MERGE/DELETE with FK handling). This is the only transactional metadata apply.
definition.orderingHint: Exactly one metadataSync per flow; marks the split between pre- and post-metadata execution.

definition.description: Deploy actions, HTTP calls, dependency refresh, pipeline start, and post-deploy audits. Most steps warn on failure but allow the run to complete.
definition.orderingHint: All steps after the first metadataSync step.

definition.description: Reserved boundary for fire-and-forget or post-commit hooks. Steps tagged postCommit run after postMetadata in the current scheduler.
definition.orderingHint: Runs after postMetadata steps in the current scheduler.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected entity scope.

definition.description: Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.
Calls core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncOrNot.
Creates the contract archive dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=archive).
Runs core.uspCreateDatasetFKs after dataset layers exist.
Creates the contract dim dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=dim).
Creates the contract fact dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=fact).
Creates the contract list dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=list).
Creates the contract stage dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=stage).
Runs core.uspDeployETL2CustomTransformation for the contract on target.
Runs core.uspDeployRoutine for the contract on target.
Runs core.uspRunContractDeploymentScripts with action Run postScript.
Runs core.uspRunContractDeploymentScripts with action Run preScript.
Runs core.uspUndeployMarkedContract on target for the contract entity.
POST to ETL service /dataset/deploy for the resolved subject.
core.uspAuditRunCheck on target with action deployDate.
Runs core.uspObjectDependencies on target (@id, @objectName).
GET gate service /api/meta/refresh.
POST to agent /pipeline/register for contract pipeline subject.
POST to agent /pipeline/start with pipeline name from step.
POST to ETL service /rules/deploy with ruleId.
core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncDate.
Sets contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=true).
Clears contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=false).
Numeric id of the entity being synced (contractId, datasetId, ruleId, …). Same for every step in the run.
UPN of the user who started the sync run.
Flow step id (step.id) of the step currently executing.
Contract name on target after metadata sync (core.Contract.name for plan entity id).

resolver.query: SELECT [name] AS name FROM core.Contract WHERE contractId = @entityId

definition.description: Target SQL: inputDatasetId from core.Rule for the synced rule.

resolver.query: SELECT inputDatasetId FROM core.[Rule] WHERE ruleId = @entityId

definition.description: Target SQL: pipelineId from core.Pipeline for the synced contract.

resolver.query: SELECT pipelineId FROM core.Pipeline WHERE contractId = @entityId

definition.description: Dependency object name string (e.g. content, rule). Typed on each flow step.
Contract / Dataset / Rule label for audit gate procedures (@objType). Typed on each flow step.
Agent pipeline display name (not pipeline id). Typed on each flow step.

strategies._comment: Shipped SCD2 strategy presets — seed SQLite on boot; operators may fork or edit from Entity Registry → Strategies. Export from DB to refresh this file after review.

strategies.description: Template for validity/audit columns when present on a table. At preview/execute each field is intersected with live source/target columns; absent columns are omitted, never assumed.
validFrom/validTo stamping only — no extra audit columns.
No SCD2 stamping — full row replace semantics.
Exclude created/modified audit columns from diff; no validity stamping.

environments._comment: ABI sync environments. Roles stay general-purpose; current direction policy is restricted by allowedSyncEnvironments.

flowTemplates._comment: MyMI-derived sync vocabulary: actions (reusable handlers), value sources (wiring), and flows (ordered step instances). Seeds DB-backed config; operators may edit after bootstrap.
